Drop samples from a NIPTeR control group by sample name

nipter_drop_control_group_samples.Rd

Convenience helper for quickly pruning a control cohort before rebuilding downstream reference artifacts.

Usage

nipter_drop_control_group_samples(control_group, sample_names)

Arguments

control_group

A NIPTeRControlGroup object.

sample_names

Character vector of sample names to drop.

Value

A NIPTeRControlGroup of the same strand type with the requested samples removed.

See also

nipter_as_control_group(), nipter_diagnose_control_group()
